title: ollama/ollama
summary: Get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama with full streaming and promise support.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client library for Ollama with async/sync APIs.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM backends.

title: ollama-webui
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI client for Ollama with dark mode, code highlighting, and model management.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Enhanced CLI wrapper around ollama with interactive prompts and history.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama with Spring Boot starter and fluent API.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: Turn Ollama into a GitHub Copilot-style code-completion engine for VS Code.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) example using Ollama and Chroma.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that lets servers chat with any Ollama model via slash commands.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to generate, refactor and explain code using Ollama models.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support.

title: ollama-dify
summary: Dify plug-in that adds Ollama as a local model provider for no-code LLM apps.

title: ollama-rs
summary: Rust crate for Ollama with Tokio async runtime and SSE streaming.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with dependency-injection helpers.
